2604.12988.title: ROSE: An Intent-Centered Evaluation Metric for NL2SQL
2604.12988.paper_summary: Execution Accuracy (EX), the widely used metric for evaluating the effectiveness of Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) solutions, is becoming increasingly unreliable. It is sensitive to syntactic variation, ignores that questions may admit multiple interpretations, and is easily misled by erroneous ground-truth SQL. To address this, we introduce ROSE, an intent-centered metric that focuses on whether the predicted SQL answers the question, rather than consistency with the ground-truth SQL under the reference-dependent paradigm. ROSE employs an adversarial Prover-Refuter cascade: SQL Prover assesses the semantic correctness of a predicted SQL against the user's intent independently, while Adversarial Refuter uses the ground-truth SQL as evidence to challenge and refine this judgment. On our expert-aligned validation set ROSE-VEC, ROSE achieves the best agreement with human experts, outperforming the next-best metric by nearly 24% in Cohen's Kappa. We also conduct a largescale re-evaluation of 19 NL2SQL methods, revealing four valuable insights. We release ROSE and ROSE-VEC to facilitate more reliable NL2SQL research.
2604.12988.paper_summary_zh: 執行準確性（EX），這是一個廣泛使用的指標來評估自然語言到 SQL（NL2SQL）解決方案的有效性，正變得越來越不可靠。它對語法變化敏感，忽略了問題可能有多重解釋的情況，並且容易受到錯誤的真實 SQL 的誤導。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了 ROSE，一個以意圖為中心的指標，專注於預測的 SQL 是否回答了問題，而不是在參考依賴範式下與真實 SQL 的一致性。ROSE 採用對抗性的證明者-反駁者級聯：SQL 證明者獨立評估預測 SQL 是否符合用戶的意圖，而對抗性反駁者則使用真實 SQL 作為證據來挑戰和完善這一判斷。在我們的專家對齊驗證集 ROSE-VEC 上，ROSE 與人類專家的一致性最佳，在 Cohen 的 Kappa 中超過了第二好的指標近 24%。我們還對 19 種 NL2SQL 方法進行了大規模的重新評估，揭示了四個有價值的見解。我們發布 ROSE 和 ROSE-VEC，以促進更可靠的 NL2SQL 研究。
2604.12988.author: Wenqi Pei et.al.
2604.12988.authors: Wenqi Pei, Shizheng Hou, Boyan Li, Han Chen, Zhichao Shi, Yuyu Luo
